game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Shoot The Zombirds:** Players defend a patch of 5 pumpkins from waves of incoming "Zombirds" by tapping anywhere on the screen to fire a crossbow bolt at the tapped location, aiming to eliminate all airborne threats before they reach the ground. Each Zombird requires a specific number of hits (e.g., 1-3 depending on type) to be destroyed, and if any Zombird successfully lands, it damages a pumpkin, with the game ending when all 5 pumpkins are destroyed. As players successfully clear waves, they earn coins and experience points, which can be spent between rounds to unlock new crossbow upgrades like increased fire rate or bolt damage, and to acquire temporary magic powers such as a multi-shot ability or a protective shield for the pumpkins. Difficulty scales by increasing the number of Zombirds per wave, their flight speed, and introducing new, tougher Zombird types with unique attack patterns every 5 waves. The core loop involves surviving as many waves as possible to achieve a high score and climb global leaderboards, while completing specific in-game challenges like "destroy 50 red Zombirds" grants bonus currency.
game_info.description: Defend your precious pumpkin patch from waves of mutant Zombirds! Fire crossbow bolts by pressing the arrow keys to aim and SPACE to shoot. Each wave brings more dangerous enemies with varying health and speeds. Earn coins to upgrade your crossbow between waves. Survive as long as possible - if all 5 pumpkins are destroyed, it's game over!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT): Aim crossbow in that direction
SPACE: Fire crossbow bolt
SHIFT: Activate multi-shot power (when available)
Z: Activate shield power (when available)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (returns to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic game mechanics including movement, shooting, and entity interactions. Validates that the player can aim, fire bolts, hit zombirds, and that collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Fire bolts in random directions while attempting to hit zombirds. Track successful hits and score changes. Test all four directional aiming modes.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully fires bolts, detects collisions with zombirds, updates score appropriately, and validates that zombirds take damage and are destroyed when health reaches zero.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully fires bolts, detects collisions with zombirds, updates score appropriately, and validates that zombirds take damage and are destroyed when health reaches zero.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the optimal winning strategy by implementing intelligent targeting and efficient wave clearing. This validates that the game is winnable and tests the complete game loop through multiple waves.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Track all active zombirds, prioritize targets closest to the ground (highest threat), aim precisely at their positions, and fire with optimal timing. Purchase upgrades between waves to increase effectiveness. Use power-ups strategically when overwhelmed.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully clear multiple waves, earn coins, purchase upgrades, and demonstrate that the game can be won through skilled play. Validate that difficulty scaling works and that the player can progress through increasingly challenging waves.

TEST_3.test_description: Test upgrade system and economy mechanics. Validates that coins are earned correctly, upgrades can be purchased, and they provide meaningful improvements to gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Play through waves while tracking coin earnings. Between waves, purchase each available upgrade and verify that they apply correctly (fire rate increase, damage increase, power-up unlocks).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Coins accumulate based on zombirds destroyed. Upgrades can be purchased when affordable. Purchased upgrades improve player capabilities measurably. Game balance remains fair with upgrades.
TEST_3.description: Test upgrade system and economy mechanics. Validates that coins are earned correctly, upgrades can be purchased, and they provide meaningful improvements to gameplay.

TEST_4.test_description: Test power-up system including multi-shot and shield abilities. Validates that powers can be activated, have cooldowns, and provide meaningful tactical advantages.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Unlock power-ups through upgrades, activate them during waves, and verify their effects. Multi-shot should fire multiple bolts, shield should protect pumpkins temporarily.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Power-ups activate when keys are pressed and resources are available. Effects apply correctly. Cooldowns prevent spam. Strategic use of powers helps survive difficult waves.
